name: turbo
description: Turborepo is a high-performance build system for JavaScript and TypeScript codebases

subcommands.name: bin
subcommands.description: Get the path to the turbo binary

subcommands.name: link
subcommands.description: Link your local directory to a Vercel organization and enable remote caching

options.description: Do not create or modify .gitignore
Attempt to authenticate to the specified team using SSO

subcommands.name: prune
subcommands.description: Prepare a subset of your monorepo

options.description: Specify package to act as entry point for pruned monorepo
Output pruned workspace into 'fill' and 'json' directories optimized for Docker layer caching

subcommands.name: unlink
subcommands.description: Unlink the current directory from your Vercel organization and disable remote caching

options.description: Specify packages to act as entry points for task execution
Specify local filesystem cache directory
Limit the concurrency of task execution (use `1` for serial)
Continue execution even if a task exits with an error
Ignore the existing cache
Generate a Dot graph of the task execution
Specify glob of global filesystem dependencies to be hashed (useful for .env and files in the root directory)
Limit/set scope to changed packages since a mergebase
The slug of a turborepo.com team
A turborepo.com access token
Files to ignore when calculating changed files (supports globs)
File to write turbo's performance profile into
Execute all tasks in parallel
Include the dependencies of tasks in execution
Exclude dependent task consumers from execution
Avoid saving task results to the cache (useful for development/watch tasks)
List the packages in scope and the tasks that would be run
Print the version
Print a help message
